TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Lwax khu' = Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ufungsyang ka alang Lwax khu'. 44 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 80 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 39% niqan 31 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 61% niqan 49 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 34%, Saysiyat 4%. Tnhangan alang Alang Yung-san. Thyang alang Alang Yung-san ida bukuy spayis do niqan ka hangan nii da, dungus na bi o ririh saw gaga thngayan rulung ka dgiyaq, duri o yasa mniq Ta-ru-ling-daw tnxalan hiya, kika ngalan s-u tnxalan uri. Nniqan alang Sing-cu-seyn Wu-hong-sayng Alang Taw-san. Klbangan Sing-cu-seyng Wu-hong-syang Alang Taw-san 4 ling quri hiya tnalang, seejiq Atayal slawa dha "Lwax khu'", gaga mniq hhunac hraan hidaw yabi 5000 kncisan Alang Ulay. Kdkilan lnglingay Gaga mniq Ta-ru-ling-daw tnxalan hiya. Kndkilan lnglingay Mlutuc syusan Teyn-c Mniq alang seejiq Seejiq Ataya. Jilan kari Kari Atayal, kari Tlu, kari Khilang. Snhiyan utux Jidujyao. Pnyahan alang Ida murug "Gaya na Tayal"ni "Patas emnuda Kaw-sa-cu "na pntasan,kla mniq May-pa-lay-se"kika alang Sing-cu-seyn Wu-hong-sayng Cu-lin sayang ", bukuy do ini baka ka dxgal qpahan, iyux miing bgurah dxgal, tmhjil hini mniq da. klaan rrigan Teumal bnatas patas Kndusan Atayal: Thjil ni kkrana Alang: pnatas Lyaw-so-cen. Knlangan sing-wun cwan-ke sapah pyasan kwan-kwang ke. Hnkawas1984 . klabuy 152;319-323 Hangan dxgal Taywan ce-su-jung maxal spac: Sin-cu sayn. Lyuo-ming-yi dnii snalu. Tay-wan-seng wun-syeyn wey-yueyn-hwey. Hnkawas 2010. Klabuy 602.Patas emnuda Kaw-sa-cu: Endaan sbiyaw. Taywan cun-du-fu cing-wu-cuy li-hwan-ke pusu pnatas; Cung-yan-yayn-cyo-yueyn ming-cu-suey yayn-cyo-swo snalu tmhjil. Cung-yayn-yueyn ming-cu-swo. Hnkawas 2011. Klabuy 82-84.
S.PHON: = lwax kħu' = gaga mniq sinʦusən u*uŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ lwax kħu'. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, ** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal **%, sajsijat *%. tnħaŋan alaŋ alaŋ juŋ-san. tħjaŋ alaŋ alaŋ juŋ-san ida bukuj spajis do niqan ka ħaŋan nii da, duŋus na bi o ɾiɾiħ saw gaga tħŋajan ɾuluŋ ka dgijaq, duɾi o jasa mniq ta-ɾu-liŋ-daw tnxalan ħija, kika ŋalan s-u tnxalan uɾi. nniqan alaŋ siŋ-ʦu-sən wu-ħoŋ-sajŋ alaŋ taw-san. klbaŋan siŋ-ʦu-səŋ wu-ħoŋ-sjaŋ alaŋ taw-san * liŋ quɾi ħija tnalaŋ, səəɟiq atajal slawa dħa "lwax kħu'", gaga mniq ħħunaʦ ħɾaan ħidaw jabi **** knʦisan alaŋ ulaj. kdkilan lŋliŋaj gaga mniq ta-ɾu-liŋ-daw tnxalan ħija. kndkilan lŋliŋaj mlutuʦ sjusan tən-ʦ mniq alaŋ səəɟiq səəɟiq ataja. ɟilan kaɾi kaɾi atajal, kaɾi tlu, kaɾi kħilaŋ. snħijan utux ɟiduɟjao. pnjaħan alaŋ ida muɾug "gaja na tajal"ni "patas əmnuda kaw-sa-ʦu "na pntasan,kla mniq maj-pa-laj-sə"kika alaŋ siŋ-ʦu-sən wu-ħoŋ-sajŋ ʦu-lin sajaŋ ", bukuj do ini baka ka dxgal qpaħan, ijux miiŋ bguɾaħ dxgal, tmħɟil ħini mniq da. klaan ɾɾigan təumal bnatas patas kndusan atajal: tħɟil ni kkɾana alaŋ: pnatas ljaw-so-ʦən. knlaŋan siŋ-wun ʦwan-kə sapaħ pjasan kwan-kwaŋ kə. ħnkawas**** . klabuj ***;***-*** ħaŋan dxgal tajwan ʦə-su-ɟuŋ maxal spaʦ: sin-ʦu sajn. ljuo-miŋ-ji dnii snalu. taj-wan-səŋ wun-sjən wə-juən-ħwə. ħnkawas ****. klabuj ***.patas əmnuda kaw-sa-ʦu: əndaan sbijaw. tajwan ʦun-du-*u ʦiŋ-wu-ʦuj li-ħwan-kə pusu pnatas; ʦuŋ-jan-jajn-ʦjo-juən miŋ-ʦu-suə jajn-ʦjo-swo snalu tmħɟil. ʦuŋ-jajn-juən miŋ-ʦu-swo. ħnkawas ****. klabuj **-**.
S.FORM: = Lwax khu' = Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ufungsyang ka alang Lwax khu'. 44 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 80 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 39% niqan 31 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 61% niqan 49 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 34%, Saysiyat 4%. Tnhangan alang Alang Yung-san. Thyang alang Alang Yung-san ida bukuy spayis do niqan ka hangan nii da, dungus na bi o ririh saw gaga thngayan rulung ka dgiyaq, duri o yasa mniq Ta-ru-ling-daw tnxalan hiya, kika ngalan s-u tnxalan uri. Nniqan alang Sing-cu-seyn Wu-hong-sayng Alang Taw-san. Klbangan Sing-cu-seyng Wu-hong-syang Alang Taw-san 4 ling quri hiya tnalang, seejiq Atayal slawa dha "Lwax khu'", gaga mniq hhunac hraan hidaw yabi 5000 kncisan Alang Ulay. Kdkilan lnglingay Gaga mniq Ta-ru-ling-daw tnxalan hiya. Kndkilan lnglingay Mlutuc syusan Teyn-c Mniq alang seejiq Seejiq Ataya. Jilan kari Kari Atayal, kari Tlu, kari Khilang. Snhiyan utux Jidujyao. Pnyahan alang Ida murug "Gaya na Tayal"ni "Patas emnuda Kaw-sa-cu "na pntasan,kla mniq May-pa-lay-se"kika alang Sing-cu-seyn Wu-hong-sayng Cu-lin sayang ", bukuy do ini baka ka dxgal qpahan, iyux miing bgurah dxgal, tmhjil hini mniq da. klaan rrigan Teumal bnatas patas Kndusan Atayal: Thjil ni kkrana Alang: pnatas Lyaw-so-cen. Knlangan sing-wun cwan-ke sapah pyasan kwan-kwang ke. Hnkawas1984 . klabuy 152;319-323 Hangan dxgal Taywan ce-su-jung maxal spac: Sin-cu sayn. Lyuo-ming-yi dnii snalu. Tay-wan-seng wun-syeyn wey-yueyn-hwey. Hnkawas 2010. Klabuy 602.Patas emnuda Kaw-sa-cu: Endaan sbiyaw. Taywan cun-du-fu cing-wu-cuy li-hwan-ke pusu pnatas; Cung-yan-yayn-cyo-yueyn ming-cu-suey yayn-cyo-swo snalu tmhjil. Cung-yayn-yueyn ming-cu-swo. Hnkawas 2011. Klabuy 82-84.
S.PHON: = lwax kħu' = gaga mniq sinʦusən u*uŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ lwax kħu'. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, ** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal **%, sajsijat *%. tnħaŋan alaŋ alaŋ juŋ-san. tħjaŋ alaŋ alaŋ juŋ-san ida bukuj spajis do niqan ka ħaŋan nii da, duŋus na bi o ɾiɾiħ saw gaga tħŋajan ɾuluŋ ka dgijaq, duɾi o jasa mniq ta-ɾu-liŋ-daw tnxalan ħija, kika ŋalan s-u tnxalan uɾi. nniqan alaŋ siŋ-ʦu-sən wu-ħoŋ-sajŋ alaŋ taw-san. klbaŋan siŋ-ʦu-səŋ wu-ħoŋ-sjaŋ alaŋ taw-san * liŋ quɾi ħija tnalaŋ, səəɟiq atajal slawa dħa "lwax kħu'", gaga mniq ħħunaʦ ħɾaan ħidaw jabi **** knʦisan alaŋ ulaj. kdkilan lŋliŋaj gaga mniq ta-ɾu-liŋ-daw tnxalan ħija. kndkilan lŋliŋaj mlutuʦ sjusan tən-ʦ mniq alaŋ səəɟiq səəɟiq ataja. ɟilan kaɾi kaɾi atajal, kaɾi tlu, kaɾi kħilaŋ. snħijan utux ɟiduɟjao. pnjaħan alaŋ ida muɾug "gaja na tajal"ni "patas əmnuda kaw-sa-ʦu "na pntasan,kla mniq maj-pa-laj-sə"kika alaŋ siŋ-ʦu-sən wu-ħoŋ-sajŋ ʦu-lin sajaŋ ", bukuj do ini baka ka dxgal qpaħan, ijux miiŋ bguɾaħ dxgal, tmħɟil ħini mniq da. klaan ɾɾigan təumal bnatas patas kndusan atajal: tħɟil ni kkɾana alaŋ: pnatas ljaw-so-ʦən. knlaŋan siŋ-wun ʦwan-kə sapaħ pjasan kwan-kwaŋ kə. ħnkawas**** . klabuj ***;***-*** ħaŋan dxgal tajwan ʦə-su-ɟuŋ maxal spaʦ: sin-ʦu sajn. ljuo-miŋ-ji dnii snalu. taj-wan-səŋ wun-sjən wə-juən-ħwə. ħnkawas ****. klabuj ***.patas əmnuda kaw-sa-ʦu: əndaan sbijaw. tajwan ʦun-du-*u ʦiŋ-wu-ʦuj li-ħwan-kə pusu pnatas; ʦuŋ-jan-jajn-ʦjo-juən miŋ-ʦu-suə jajn-ʦjo-swo snalu tmħɟil. ʦuŋ-jajn-juən miŋ-ʦu-swo. ħnkawas ****. klabuj **-**.
